mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM bnc_company company, bnc_biz_category cate WHERE company.cmpy_biz_code = cate.bizc_code
AND cate.${searchType} like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
SELECT * FROM bnc_company order by cmpy_rdate desc
SELECT * FROM bnc_company company, bnc_biz_category cate WHERE company.cmpy_biz_code = cate.bizc_code and cmpy_biznum = #{cmpy_biznum}
mapper.update: UPDATE bnc_company SET cmpy_biznum = #{cmpy_biznum}, cmpy_biz_doc_file_path = #{cmpy_biz_doc_file_path}, cmpy_udate = TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHHmmss') WHERE cmpy_memb_id = #{cmpy_memb_id}
